Package cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.house

Class Floor

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.house.Floor
public class Floor
extends java.lang.Object
This class represents Floor.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Oľga Ostashchuk, Tereza Lodrová, Michal Pechník
